goal: Finalize which assets to use, update ASSET_CREDITS.md, and prepare a clean F1_Basement.tscn scaffold.
summary: Phase 1 complete: inventoried 21 Floor1 meshes and 7 Floor1 audio files plus reusable KayKitDungeon/KayKitFurniture packs; rewrote Assets/Floor1/ASSET_CREDITS.md with 41 table rows and a placeholder policy; backed up the original F1_Basement.tscn and created a clean scaffold with World/Rooms/Props/Navigation/Zones/Audio/Lighting.
stepSummaries:
1. Inventory existing project KayKit assets and already-downloaded GitHub assets in Assets/Floor1/. [verified]
  2. Update Assets/Floor1/ASSET_CREDITS.md with every asset used, every placeholder, source, license, and URL. [verified]
  3. Back up current F1_Basement.tscn and create the new root node hierarchy (World/Rooms/Props/Navigation/Zones/Audio/Lighting). [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps used real verification (file counts, grep row counts, Python bracket balance) rather than proxies.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: find counts of .glb/.wav files; Step 2: grep row count on ASSET_CREDITS.md; Step 3: Python bracket assertion and grep child-node counts.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase outputs deliver the goal: asset inventory informs which assets to use, ASSET_CREDITS.md is updated, and F1_Basement.tscn is a clean scaffold.
gateVerdicts.evidence: ASSET_CREDITS.md has 41 rows; F1_Basement.tscn has the exact World hierarchy and 0 Room_ nodes; backup exists.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in this phase; all planned work completed.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All three steps completed and verified; no remaining items listed in worker reports.
